items.title: 1 ETF Could Turn $500 Monthly Into a $370,000 Portfolio That Pays $11,000 in Annual Dividend Income
items.author: Stefon Walters
items.description: The Vanguard High Dividend Yield ETF (VYM) offers potential for long-term investors to build a substantial dividend-generating portfolio by consistently investing $500 monthly, with historical average returns of 10.7% and a 3% dividend yield.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Demonstrates consistent performance, broad diversification across sectors, and potential for significant long-term portfolio growth through dividend reinvestment
